generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values stability and security, you should know that our allies aren't pulling their weight. While we maintain strong defenses, others in our alliance are cutting corners on preparedness. This imbalance puts our nation at risk. We need to ensure all partners meet their commitments - it's the only way to truly protect our civil liberties and maintain effective deterrence. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitments
